title: Ships as installable Claude Code skill
description: SKILL.md (250+ lines), `notebooklm skill install` CLI, `npx skills add` distribution. Three install methods. Directly relevant to JASON-OS skill portability.

title: Three-surface architecture (SDK + CLI + skill)
description: Single Python package exposes Python SDK, CLI, and agentic skill from one codebase. 'Three Ways to Use' pattern.

title: Test workflow 45% failure rate
description: Main Test workflow fails 9/20 recent runs. Nightly E2E, CodeQL, Verify, RPC Health all pass 100%. Tolerated flakiness in unit test suite.
recommendation: Indicates RPC dependency instability, not code quality issues.

title: Depends on undocumented Google RPC endpoints
description: All RPC method IDs in src/notebooklm/rpc/types.py are undocumented. Google can change them at any time. rpc-health.yml mitigates but doesn't solve.
recommendation: Don't depend on undocumented APIs for critical features.

title: POSITIVE: Most sophisticated SKILL.md in all 6 repos
description: Autonomy Rules section (22 auto + 7 ask-first), workflow examples with Task() subagent invocations, trigger patterns, multi-agent support (NOTEBOOKLM_HOME isolation).

title: POSITIVE: 8 CI workflows — most CI-mature repo analyzed
description: CodeQL, nightly e2e, publish, testpypi-publish, rpc-health, test, verify-artifacts, verify-package. Production-grade CI pipeline.

title: POSITIVE: RPC health monitoring with auto-issue creation
description: rpc-health.yml: daily cron, 3 exit codes, auto-creates labeled GitHub issues (bug/rpc-breakage/automated). 30-day artifact retention.
recommendation: Transferable pattern for external contract monitoring.
